title: InventMC Modpack
description: The Official InventMC server modpack! Join in and find out what’s up!
body:
The Official InventMC server modpack!

Current World - Veo

Previous World - OldenGrove
InventMC is the name of our server, but each time we beat the game, a new world is created (with a subname) to match the upcoming style! Join in to find out what's up or check out our Discord server to discover what's new!
